title: ETQ-101: E8-Root-Derived, D4-Triality Qutrit Sonification Model
description:
ETQ-101 v1.0.0 is a deterministic mathematical sonification specification combining an E8-root-derived graph, an explicit order-three D4 triality action, 33 three-state direct-sum orbit blocks plus two fixed singlets, ternary-curvature and qutrit algebra, and a declared 432 Hz reference scale.

The deposit contains the formal specification, canonical fixtures, dependency-free reference construction, verification scripts, and claim-boundary documentation. The deposited files are proprietary and are not open-source or open-data materials.
access_conditions: Files are not available by default. Approval of a Zenodo access request alone grants no intellectual-property licence. Unless the signed agreement expressly states otherwise, no permission is granted to execute, reproduce beyond the access copy, modify, adapt, translate, reverse engineer, distribute, publish, sublicense, commercialise, provide as a service, train or evaluate AI or machine-learning systems, create datasets or embeddings, use the materials in retrieval-augmented generation, or create derivative works. No fee is charged for requesting or receiving access through Zenodo. Non-waivable statutory rights remain unaffected.
